raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The County of Orange has received $5 million in funding to support the Be Well mental health initiative and establish a second service location in Irvine.",
    "The Be Well Campus will provide clinical and residential services for mental illness and substance use for both adults and youth.",
    "The County of Orange aims to address increased demand for mental health and substance use disorder services by establishing multiple service locations.",
    "The Orange County delegation of legislators secured $2 million to invest in a system of care data integration for care coordination.",
    "The County is developing a software solution for a coordinated data-sharing platform to allow information sharing among service providers, County departments, and external stakeholders."
```
